description: Write-from-scratch: implement validate_email basic syntactic check.

dispatch.task: Implement `validate_email(addr: str) -> bool` that returns True iff: (a) `addr` contains exactly one '@'; (b) the part before '@' is non-empty; (c) the part after '@' contains at least one '.'; (d) the address contains no whitespace; (e) length is at least 5. Otherwise return False. Do not raise.
constraints: Pure Python 3, no imports beyond stdlib
Use `re` only if you really need to; basic string ops are fine
Return only the function definition; no top-level execution
